subject_tmpl: FOIA Request – Police Report from {DATE}
body_tmpl: Hello, I am writing to request a copy of the police report from an incident that occurred on {DATE} near {ADDRESS}. I was involved as a witness and need the report for insurance purposes. My name is {FIRST} {LAST} and I can be reached at {PHONE}. Please let me know the fee and how long it will take to process. Thank you.
reply_tmpl: Dear {FIRST}, thank you for your FOIA request. Your request has been logged as Case {CASE}. Under Illinois law we have 5 business days to respond. The fee for a police report copy is $0.15 per page. We will email you when it is ready. — Yolanda Pierce, Village Clerk

subject_tmpl: Request for Copy of Village Ordinance No. {NUM}
body_tmpl: Good morning. I would like to obtain a copy of Bellwood ordinance number {NUM} that I believe was passed in {DATE}. I am a homeowner on {STREET} and need it to understand setback rules before starting a project. Can you email it to me or let me know how to get it? My name is {FIRST} {LAST}. Thank you for your help.
reply_tmpl: Hi {FIRST} — I have attached Ordinance {NUM} to this email. Let me know if you have any questions. Yolanda Pierce, Village Clerk.

subject_tmpl: FOIA – Village Board Meeting Minutes from {DATE}
body_tmpl: {FIRST} {LAST} here, a resident of Bellwood. I'm requesting the official meeting minutes from the Village Board meeting held on {DATE}. I'm specifically interested in any votes taken regarding {STREET} improvements. Please advise on any applicable fees. I can be reached at {PHONE} if needed.

subject_tmpl: Public Records Request – Budget Documents
body_tmpl: To Whom It May Concern: I am a Bellwood resident and taxpayer living at {ADDRESS}. I am requesting the Village's adopted budget for the current fiscal year, including all departmental line items. I am interested in how much was budgeted for {DEPT}. Under FOIA I understand I have a right to these records. Please confirm receipt of this request. Thank you. {FIRST} {LAST}

subject_tmpl: Records Request: Building Permit History at {ADDRESS}
body_tmpl: Hi there. I'm in the process of buying a home at {ADDRESS} and would like to request the full permit history on the property going back {DAYS} days if possible. I want to make sure all work was properly permitted. Is there a fee? I'm hoping to get this before my closing on {DATE}. Name: {FIRST} {LAST}. Phone: {PHONE}.
reply_tmpl: Dear {FIRST}, I have forwarded your request to our Building Department. Permit records for {ADDRESS} will be pulled and sent to you within 5 business days. There is no fee for electronic delivery. — Yolanda Pierce, Clerk

subject_tmpl: FOIA Request – Code Enforcement Complaints at {ADDRESS}
body_tmpl: Hello Clerk's Office — I live next door to {ADDRESS} and I'd like to know how many code enforcement complaints have been filed against that property in the last year. There have been ongoing issues and I want to understand the history. This is a FOIA request. Please let me know what information is available and any associated costs. Thank you. {FIRST} {LAST}, {STREET}.

subject_tmpl: FOIA – Contracts with {BIZ}
body_tmpl: I am submitting a Freedom of Information Act request for all contracts between the Village of Bellwood and {BIZ} executed since {DATE}. Please include any amendments or change orders. I am a resident at {ADDRESS}. If there is a fee over $10 please notify me before proceeding. {FIRST} {LAST}

subject_tmpl: Question About Getting Copies of Meeting Minutes
body_tmpl: Hello — a neighbor mentioned that meeting minutes are posted online but I can't find the ones from {DATE}. Can you tell me where to look, or can someone email them to me? I live on {STREET} and I'm trying to follow up on a discussion about parking near {CROSS}. Thank you so much. {NAME}
reply_tmpl: Hi {NAME} — the minutes you're looking for aren't posted yet; they'll go up after board approval next month. I'm attaching the draft for your reference. Yolanda Pierce, Clerk.

subject_tmpl: FOIA Request – Salary Information for Village Employees
body_tmpl: This is a FOIA request for the current salary schedule for all full-time Village of Bellwood employees, including job title and base salary. I am not requesting any private personal information — only job titles and compensation. I am a taxpayer living at {ADDRESS}. {FIRST} {LAST}, {PHONE}.

subject_tmpl: Request for Incident/Accident Report – {DATE} at {STREET}
body_tmpl: Hi, I was involved in a minor accident at the intersection of {STREET} and {CROSS} on {DATE} around {TIME}. I need a copy of the incident report for my insurance claim. Can you point me in the right direction? I'm not sure if this is a police matter or a public works matter. My name is {FIRST} {LAST} and my number is {PHONE}.
reply_tmpl: Dear {FIRST} — accident reports are handled by the Bellwood Police Department. Please contact them directly at the non-emergency line or visit the lobby at {TIME} Monday–Friday. Your report number may be {CASE}. — Yolanda Pierce, Clerk

subject_tmpl: FOIA – Water Main Break Records on {STREET}
body_tmpl: Good afternoon. I'm a homeowner on {STREET} and we've had several water disruptions this year. I'd like to formally request records of any water main breaks or service interruptions on {STREET} between {DATE} and today. I want to understand if this is a recurring infrastructure issue. Thank you. {FIRST} {LAST}

subject_tmpl: How Do I Submit a FOIA Request?
body_tmpl: Hello — I'm new to Bellwood and I'm not sure how to request public records. I'd like to get some information about zoning on my street ({STREET}) and also a copy of our neighborhood's alley maintenance schedule. Is there a form I need to fill out? What's the process? Thank you. {FIRST} {LAST}
reply_tmpl: Welcome to Bellwood, {FIRST}! To submit a FOIA request you can email this address, drop off a written request at Village Hall (3200 Washington Blvd), or call us at {PHONE}. Most records are provided within 5 business days. Happy to help. — Yolanda Pierce, Clerk

subject_tmpl: FOIA – Inspection Records for {ADDRESS}
body_tmpl: I'm requesting any inspection records, violation notices, or stop-work orders associated with the property at {ADDRESS}. I am considering purchasing this property and want to review the full inspection history before making a decision. Please let me know the turnaround time and any fees. {NAME}, {PHONE}.

subject_tmpl: Copy of Village Board Agenda for {DATE} Meeting
body_tmpl: Hello Clerk's Office, I wasn't able to attend the Village Board meeting on {DATE} and I'd like a copy of the agenda that was used. I'm particularly interested in items related to {STREET}. Is it available online, or can you email it to me? Thank you, {FIRST} {LAST}.
reply_tmpl: Hi {FIRST} — I've attached the agenda from the {DATE} meeting. Approved minutes will follow once ratified at the next board session. — Yolanda Pierce

subject_tmpl: FOIA – 911 Call Logs for {STREET} ({DATE})
body_tmpl: This is a formal FOIA request. I would like to obtain the 911 call log or dispatch records for calls made from or near {ADDRESS} on {DATE}. I am a resident at that address and I need this information for a legal matter. Please advise on what is releasable and any applicable costs. {FIRST} {LAST}, {PHONE}.

subject_tmpl: Public Budget Question – {DEPT} Spending
body_tmpl: Hi there — I'm a Bellwood resident at {ADDRESS} and I have a budget question. How much did the Village spend on {DEPT} last fiscal year? I've looked on the website but can't find a detailed breakdown. I'm not sure if this is a FOIA request or just a question. Either way, any help is appreciated. {FIRST} {LAST}
reply_tmpl: Dear {FIRST} — great question. The adopted budget is a public document and I'm happy to share it. I've attached the relevant section for {DEPT}. For more detail, feel free to contact our Finance Director, David Okafor. — Yolanda Pierce, Clerk

subject_tmpl: Request for Zoning Map or Zoning Classification for {ADDRESS}
body_tmpl: Hello — I live near {ADDRESS} and there's a commercial property next door that I've been curious about. Can you tell me what the zoning classification is for that parcel, or point me to the zoning map? I want to know what uses are permitted. If this needs to be a FOIA request, please let me know. {NAME}, {STREET}.

subject_tmpl: FOIA – Village Expenditures Over $5,000 for {DATE} Quarter
body_tmpl: I'm submitting a FOIA request for a list of all Village expenditures over $5,000 for the quarter ending {DATE}. I would like vendor name, amount, and purpose for each. I'm a taxpayer at {ADDRESS} following local spending. Please let me know when I can expect a response. {FIRST} {LAST}

subject_tmpl: How Long Does a FOIA Request Take? Following Up on {CASE}
body_tmpl: Hi — I submitted a FOIA request on {DATE} (Case {CASE}) and haven't heard back yet. It's been {DAYS} days. Can you give me a status update? I understand you're busy but I have a deadline coming up. I originally asked for {DEPT} records related to {ADDRESS}. {FIRST} {LAST}, {PHONE}.
reply_tmpl: Dear {FIRST} — I apologize for the delay on Case {CASE}. We are still gathering documents from {DEPT} and expect to respond by {DATE}. Thank you for your patience. — Yolanda Pierce, Clerk

subject_tmpl: FOIA Request – Village Insurance Policies
body_tmpl: To the Village Clerk: I am requesting a copy of the Village of Bellwood's current general liability and property insurance policies, including the insurer name and coverage limits. I am a homeowner at {ADDRESS} and am researching this after a sidewalk incident near {STREET}. {FIRST} {LAST}.

subject_tmpl: FOIA – TIF District Financials
body_tmpl: I'm requesting the most recent annual report for Bellwood's TIF district, including revenue collected and expenditures. I understand TIF reports are publicly filed. If this has already been submitted to the state, please let me know where I can find it, or provide a Village copy. Resident at {ADDRESS}. {FIRST} {LAST}, {PHONE}.
reply_tmpl: Dear {FIRST} — the TIF annual report is available on our Finance page. I'm also attaching a copy here. If you have follow-up questions our Finance Director David Okafor would be the right contact. — Yolanda Pierce

subject_tmpl: Copy of Noise Ordinance / Ordinance About Loud Music
body_tmpl: Hello, my neighbors at {ADDRESS} have been playing loud music late at night and I'd like to know my rights. Can you send me a copy of the Bellwood noise ordinance, or tell me what chapter of the municipal code covers this? I've already called the non-emergency line but would like the actual language. {FIRST} {LAST}, {STREET}.

subject_tmpl: FOIA – Police Department Response Times
body_tmpl: I am a resident at {ADDRESS} and I'm submitting a FOIA request for aggregate police department response time data for calls in my neighborhood ({STREET} to {CROSS}) over the past 12 months. I am not asking for any personal identifying information about callers or officers. Please let me know what's available. {FIRST} {LAST}.

subject_tmpl: Request for Animal Control Complaint Records – {STREET}
body_tmpl: Hi — I'd like to request records of animal control complaints or citations filed for the property at {ADDRESS} over the last two years. There's a dog situation in the neighborhood that's been going on and I want to see the complaint history before I escalate. {NAME}, {PHONE}.
reply_tmpl: Dear {NAME} — I've located {NUM} animal control records associated with {ADDRESS}. I'll have copies ready within 5 business days. Fee will be minimal. — Yolanda Pierce, Village Clerk

subject_tmpl: Question About Open Meetings Act – {DATE} Executive Session
body_tmpl: I attended the Village Board meeting on {DATE} and the board went into executive session. I'd like to know what topics are permitted for executive session under the Illinois Open Meetings Act. I'm also wondering if there is a recorded vote to go into closed session that I can request. Thank you. {FIRST} {LAST}, {ADDRESS}.

subject_tmpl: FOIA – Any Complaints About {ADDRESS} in Last {DAYS} Days
body_tmpl: Hello Clerk Pierce — I'm submitting a FOIA request for any complaints, service requests, or code enforcement actions involving the property at {ADDRESS} in the last {DAYS} days. I'm the owner and I'm trying to get a complete picture of any open issues before renovating. My name is {FIRST} {LAST} and I'm reachable at {PHONE}.

subject_tmpl: Where Do I Find Bellwood's Municipal Code Online?
body_tmpl: Hi there — I've been trying to find the full Bellwood municipal code online to look up rules about fences and accessory structures. Is there a link? I live at {ADDRESS} and I want to make sure I'm in compliance before putting up a fence this spring. {FIRST} {LAST}.
reply_tmpl: Hi {FIRST} — the municipal code is available at Municode.com. Search for Bellwood, Illinois. Fence regulations are in Chapter {NUM}. Feel free to contact our building department for a pre-application meeting. — Yolanda Pierce, Clerk

subject_tmpl: FOIA – Street Resurfacing Contract for {STREET}
body_tmpl: I'm a homeowner on {STREET} and I'd like to request the awarded contract for the upcoming road resurfacing project on our block, including the contractor name, bid amount, and project scope. I heard it was awarded at the {DATE} board meeting. {FIRST} {LAST}, {ADDRESS}, {PHONE}.
reply_tmpl: Dear {FIRST} — the {STREET} resurfacing contract was awarded to Verdi Excavating for {AMOUNT}. I am attaching the executed agreement per your FOIA request. Yolanda Pierce, Village Clerk.

subject_tmpl: Request for Water Quality Report / CCR
body_tmpl: Hello — I'd like to request a copy of Bellwood's most recent Consumer Confidence Report (water quality report). I know it's required to be distributed annually but I didn't receive one this year. I live at {ADDRESS} and I'm concerned about water quality on {STREET} after seeing discoloration. {NAME}, {PHONE}.

subject_tmpl: FOIA – Liquor License Records for {BIZ}
body_tmpl: I am requesting any liquor license applications, inspection results, or violations on file for {BIZ} located at {ADDRESS}. I am a neighbor and I am concerned about recent activities at that establishment. This is a formal FOIA request. {FIRST} {LAST}, {STREET}, Bellwood, IL.

subject_tmpl: FOIA Request – Fire Inspection Reports for My Building
body_tmpl: Hello — I rent at {ADDRESS} and I'd like to know if this building has had any fire inspections in the past two years and if there are any outstanding violations. I've noticed several potential hazards and my landlord isn't being responsive. Submitting this as a FOIA request. {FIRST} {LAST}, {PHONE}.
reply_tmpl: Dear {FIRST} — I've forwarded your request to the Fire Department. You can expect a response within 5 business days per FOIA statute. Case number: {CASE}. — Yolanda Pierce

subject_tmpl: Requesting a Copy of My Neighbor's Variance Application
body_tmpl: My neighbor at {ADDRESS} recently applied for a zoning variance and I wasn't properly notified. I'd like to request a copy of the application and any supporting documents. I live at {STREET} and this could affect my property. Please advise on next steps too. {FIRST} {LAST}.

subject_tmpl: FOIA – Vendor Payments to {BIZ} in Last Fiscal Year
body_tmpl: I'd like to request documentation of any payments made by the Village of Bellwood to {BIZ} during the last complete fiscal year. Please include invoice dates, amounts, and the department that authorized each payment. This is a formal request under the Illinois FOIA. Resident: {FIRST} {LAST}, {ADDRESS}.

subject_tmpl: Can I Get a Copy of a Village Board Resolution?
body_tmpl: Hi — I'm looking for a copy of the board resolution that authorized work on {STREET} near {CROSS}. I believe it was passed sometime around {DATE}. I don't know the resolution number. Is this something I can get emailed to me? I'm not sure if I need to file a FOIA or just ask. {FIRST} {LAST}.
reply_tmpl: Hi {FIRST} — no formal FOIA needed for resolutions; they're public record. I found Resolution {NUM} from {DATE} which covers {STREET}. Attaching now. Let me know if you need anything else. — Yolanda Pierce

subject_tmpl: FOIA – Records of Tree Removal Permits on {STREET}
body_tmpl: Hello. Several large trees were removed from the parkway on {STREET} between {CROSS} and {NUM} last month and no one in the neighborhood was informed. I'd like to request any permits or work orders authorizing this removal, along with the reason. {FIRST} {LAST}, {ADDRESS}.

subject_tmpl: FOIA – Environmental Complaints Near {STREET} and {CROSS}
body_tmpl: I'm a long-time resident at {ADDRESS} and I've noticed chemical smells near the intersection of {STREET} and {CROSS} for the past {DAYS} days. I'd like to FOIA any environmental complaints or reports filed for that area. Has the Village contacted any state or county agencies about this? {FIRST} {LAST}, {PHONE}.
reply_tmpl: Dear {FIRST} — I've logged your concern as {CASE} and notified our Health Officer, Priya Nair, who will follow up with Cook County. We have {NUM} prior complaints on file for that area. — Yolanda Pierce, Clerk

subject_tmpl: FOIA – Grant Applications Submitted by the Village
body_tmpl: I'm interested in what grants the Village of Bellwood has applied for or received in the current and prior fiscal year. Please include grantor name, project purpose, and grant amount. This is a FOIA request. I believe in government transparency and think residents should know about outside funding. {NAME}, {ADDRESS}.

subject_tmpl: I Need a Copy of My Property's Flood Zone Status
body_tmpl: Hello — I'm trying to determine whether my property at {ADDRESS} is in a flood zone. My mortgage company is asking me to provide documentation. Does the Village have records of this, or can you point me to who I should contact? I also want to know if there have been any drainage complaints for my block on {STREET}. {FIRST} {LAST}, {PHONE}.
reply_tmpl: Hi {FIRST} — Flood zone information comes from FEMA's FIRM maps; the official resource is msc.fema.gov. I can also check our stormwater engineer's records. I'll copy Tom Reyes on this reply. — Yolanda Pierce

subject_tmpl: FOIA – Public Works Maintenance Logs for {STREET}
body_tmpl: This is a FOIA request for any Public Works maintenance logs, pothole repair orders, or street patching records for {STREET} between {CROSS} and {NUM} Ave for the last 24 months. I'm compiling this information for a neighborhood association presentation. {FIRST} {LAST}, {ADDRESS}.

subject_tmpl: Request for Copy of Sidewalk Snow Removal Policy
body_tmpl: Hi — I want to understand what the Village's policy is for sidewalk snow removal and what the requirements are for property owners. Can you email me a copy of the relevant ordinance? I'm on {STREET} and a few neighbors have been disputing who's responsible for the walk near the corner of {CROSS}. {FIRST} {LAST}.
reply_tmpl: Dear {FIRST} — property owners are responsible for clearing sidewalks adjacent to their property within 24 hours after snowfall ends per Bellwood Municipal Code Chapter {NUM}. I've attached the relevant section. — Yolanda Pierce, Clerk

subject_tmpl: FOIA – Overtime Expenditures by Department Last Fiscal Year
body_tmpl: Hello — I'd like to request a summary of overtime expenditures broken down by department for the last complete fiscal year. I'm a resident at {ADDRESS} and I'm following the Village's budget closely. I don't need individual employee information — just department-level totals. {FIRST} {LAST}.

subject_tmpl: Question About FOIA Denial – Case {CASE}
body_tmpl: Hello Clerk Pierce — I received a denial letter for my FOIA request (Case {CASE}) dated {DATE}. The letter cited a privacy exemption. I'm not sure I agree that exemption applies. Can you tell me more about my appeal options? I believe the records I requested are public. {FIRST} {LAST}, {PHONE}.
reply_tmpl: Dear {FIRST} — under the Illinois FOIA Act you may appeal a denial to the Public Access Counselor at the Illinois Attorney General's office within 60 days. I can provide the PAC contact information if you'd like. — Yolanda Pierce, Clerk

subject_tmpl: FOIA – Parking Ticket Revenues and Citations Issued
body_tmpl: I'm a Bellwood taxpayer and I'd like to request data on the total number of parking citations issued and total revenue collected from parking fines for the last two fiscal years. I live at {ADDRESS} and have concerns about enforcement patterns on {STREET}. {FIRST} {LAST}.

subject_tmpl: FOIA – Any Development Applications Pending for {ADDRESS}
body_tmpl: Hi — I've heard rumors that there's a development proposal for the vacant lot at {ADDRESS} near {CROSS}. I'd like to know if any applications have been submitted for that parcel — rezoning, PUD, annexation, or otherwise. I live nearby at {STREET} and want to be informed. {FIRST} {LAST}, {PHONE}.
reply_tmpl: Dear {FIRST} — I have checked our records and there is currently one pending application associated with {ADDRESS}. I will send you the available documents within 5 business days under FOIA. Case number {CASE}. — Yolanda Pierce

subject_tmpl: FOIA – Any Letters or Notices Sent to {ADDRESS} by the Village
body_tmpl: Hello — I recently purchased the property at {ADDRESS} and I want to make sure I'm not inheriting any outstanding notices or violations the prior owner may have received. Can I request copies of any official correspondence the Village sent to that address in the last {DAYS} days? {FIRST} {LAST}, {PHONE}.
reply_tmpl: Dear {FIRST} — welcome to Bellwood! I have checked our records. There are {NUM} notices on file for {ADDRESS}. I will send you copies within 5 business days at no charge since they are under 50 pages. — Yolanda Pierce, Village Clerk
